calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-19-2011 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-22-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-22-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, #7235

RUSSELL L. GOODROW, Esq. for Plaintiff: PAUL FAN.
Plaintiff's Witness PAUL FAN was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant JENNIFER DAMAN.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 222 SADOWA ST. LOWER UNIT, San Francisco, CA 94124.
The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: Jwillis-McGhee; Not Reported.

Case did not settle.
No appearance by the Defendant.
Trial date confirmed.
